title: Prayer To Get Ex Back | Prayers To Get Your Ex Back (Restoration)
text: welcome to the prayer to get your ex back this is simply a prayer I've put together where I'd like to pray for anyone within the sound of my voice all I ask you to do is to agree with me as I pray and together we will seek our Heavenly Father please continue to meditate on this prayer for yourself speak it daily or listen to this over and over again and allow the Word of God to reach deep into your spirit let us pray Heavenly Father we gather together and come into agreement in the wonderful and powerful name of Jesus where two or more are gathered there you'll be in the midst of us and anything we agree upon is touching you will surely do the Bible says if there's any unforgiveness that it should be dealt with before praying therefore we release any anger bad feelings resentment or any other wrong attitude before you now we lay it at your feet and we release and forgive those who have wronged us father in Jesus name there's no distance in the spirit and we thank you for the listener who desires a prayer to get their ex back Almighty God the listener admits and realizes that they made some mistakes in the relationship with their ex in the past so here we are with everything placed before your throne you already know what's going on and what went down you are all-knowing Lord the listener may have gotten off-track they may have gotten too busy at times and simply stopped or slowed down making deposits into the relationship with their ex who they love and need they realize it now but listener may have expected their ex to perform for them father but they didn't put enough good back into the relationship they didn't deposit back into it now they're experiencing the consequences both of their action and perhaps their inaction father in Jesus name we asked together that you please forgive them for not showing appreciation to the racks who is so precious to them show the listener that it's okay to repent before you and to seek your mercy to seek your forgiveness in all areas that they may have fallen short in their relationship your love father is overflowing it's abundant it's everlasting and thanks to Jesus forgiveness is freely given to the listener when they ask hallelujah well now that the listeners

text: areas that they may have fallen short in their relationship your love father is overflowing it's abundant it's everlasting and thanks to Jesus forgiveness is freely given to the listener when they ask hallelujah well now that the listeners repent father and is repented for misplacing their priorities and valuing their relationship with you together we bring that relationship before you the truth is you know the end from the beginning Lord true repentance and submission to your plan for their life means they have to be willing to sacrifice this relationship if you ask them to and so firstly if it is not the absolute best for the listener to continue pursuing this relationship to continue to go after this relationship we ask in Jesus name that you show this to them and strengthen and empower them in Jesus name to make this decision as well as follow through with it to walk away now secondly if it is your plan for them to continue knowing that this relationship can be restored we cry out to help from you help Lord in Jesus name please help the listener to restore this relationship right now we bind the plans and strategies of the devil from further dividing the listener and their ex we break them down father render those plants and attacks God exposed and useless in Jesus name we bind unity and restoration - this relationship father that the listener wants back now we speak healing over the relationship now in Jesus name Lord please help the listener to make a solid commitment into their relationship with their ex so they can be a real blessing to them father show them how to nurture and grow this relationship show that it will it will remain strong and healthy we ask you Father to help the listener know how to make reconciliation with their ex what's that process father what's that procedure that's right before your eyes in Jesus name we ask for wisdom for them on how to approach reaching out and connecting with their ex and about working things out show them how to do this properly and when to do this Lord it's not only how but what about your timing right now together with the listener we shake off the spirit of of heartbreak of being desperate and full of despair that is no doubt trying to latch on to the listener we declare that the listener is strong in you Lord empowered by the Spirit of God inside of them we declare that they rise up in your strength now knowing you love them father please reveal to them in a fresh way how much

title: Prayer To Get Ex Back | Prayers To Get Your Ex Back (Restoration)
text: on to the listener we declare that the listener is strong in you Lord empowered by the Spirit of God inside of them we declare that they rise up in your strength now knowing you love them father please reveal to them in a fresh way how much you love the listener that you only desire the bear very best for them you want them to have a successful relationship even more than they do glory to your name we decree and declare that the listener refuses to wallow in self-pity and discouragement about the past they refuse to hang their heads about events things decisions anything that that are that are over with father that are unfixable the past is the past we rebuke feelings of negative emotions loneliness and isolation in Jesus name their past is not a prophecy of their future in Jesus name father the listener has repented and received your mercy and forgiveness for their past errors and they will learn from them as you show them and continue to guide them father how to not make those mistakes again we declare that they are letting the Holy Spirit lead them into the wonderful future that lies directly ahead of them praise you Lord we ask you to surround the listener with friends people God who stick with them through the tough times people father that you know are worth spending time with praise you Lord we thank you that through your power the the listener is forgetting the pain and disappointment of the past and they've placed and are placing their trust and faith in you hallelujah praise You Father that when others may fall short you will never fall short you sent your son to save the listener you sent Jesus to heal their broken heart praise you Lord that you will never leave nor forsake the listener you are with them right now and you will be with them all the days of their life in Jesus name please help the listener to be strong by your Holy Spirit father we decree and declare that they will not allow themselves to become bitter or to title: Prayer To Get Ex Back | Prayers To Get Your Ex Back (Restoration)
text: God you love them more than they know you have plans for them father that are far greater than they can ever imagine and they've got their trust in you they look to you and follow your instruction and follow your wisdom and glory from this day father the listener desires to be loving kind merciful just like Jesus help them Lord to keep their mind set on you help them father to keep their mind set on things that are honest good pure true clean and holy in Jesus name you are the listeners rock and fortress they look to you for help and safety praise you right now together we ask for supernatural peace to keep the listener from being worried or fearful father when those thoughts come father help them to recognize them problem to cast them down to rebuke them themselves in Jesus name help the listener to submit to the constant Ministry of transformation by the Holy Spirit hallelujah prepare the listener for properly being in a relationship Lord that their relationship father would never take away from their time with you we thank you that you have heard our petition for the listener regarding their ex we cast the care of this restoration and this healing process on you we believe father even now you're revealing to the listener what they need to do next and next and next and father they will refuse to fear and are remaining and walking in constant peace because they are thinking about you they are thinking about this prayer father that you are with them that you are guiding them that you only want the best for them Lord the best is yet to come in their life we sincerely ask father that your will be done in their life regarding their ex in Jesus name and father please help the listener to enter just an enter into that blessed rest which is adhering to trusting in and relying on you entirely we believe and receive everything we prayed and give you glory in advance for this prayer is answered in the wonderful and precious name of Jesus we pray amen you
